calendar.matters:
Amended Ntc Of And Motion For An Order Deeming Pltf The Prevailing Party
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion For An Order Deeming Plaintiff the Prevailing Party and to Fix Amount of Attorneys Fees Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff: Jan Minar, Trustee of James K. Nelson and Janet Ann Minar Revocable Trust.
No appearance by defendant. No opposition filed.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court orders motion granted as follows:
Attorney's Fees awarded to plaintiff in the amount of $4,432.00.
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming Pltf The Prevailing Party And To Fis Amount Of Attorney'S Fees Awardable As An Item Of Cost5s

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Jan Mina Trustee of James Nelson and Janet Ann Minar Turst.
Plaintiff's Witness: Janet Minar, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: John Schley Rutherford.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Demand Ltr.-----------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 3 - 30 Days Notice--------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: John Schley Rutherford as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 1358 Masinic Ave., San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $4,314.20
Costs per Memo of Costs
Attorney's Fees per noticed motion.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment for the total of $4,314.20 signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Continued To Sep-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
